task.title: Planting Crops
task.shortdesc: How to plant your first crops in Stardew Valley.

prereq.p: Make sure that you have seeds to plant.
In this guide, we will use the starting seeds the player receives on day 1 (15 parsnip seeds).

step.cmd: Using the axe and pickaxe, clear out any existing debris to make space for your crops.

info.note: On the first day, your farm will be full of debris. You must clear it out in order to plant crops or build any type of building onto your farm.This can be done with the axe tool, among many others.

step.cmd: Select the hoe in your hotbar and right click to till a space. Repeat until you have tilled 15 spaces for your seeds following a 5x3 pattern.

info.note: By holding down right click, you can simply slide your cursor to till multiple spaces simultaneously instead of tilling spaces one by one.

step.cmd: Select the seeds in your hotbar and right click to plant them. Repeat until you have planted all the seeds in the spaces you tilled.
Select the watering can in your hotbar and right click to water a crop. Repeat until you have watered all the crops.

result.p: Your seeds are planted. You now have to wait for them to grow in order to harvest them.
